name: stift
description: Image annotation and compositing tool for technical reports

scripts.test:visual: docker run --rm --add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway -v $(pwd)/scripts:/scripts -v $(pwd)/test/reference:/reference:ro -v $(pwd)/test:/screenshots -w /scripts mcr.microsoft.com/playwright:v1.52.0-noble bash -c 'npm install playwright@1.52.0 2>/dev/null && node test-examples.mjs'
scripts.test:visual:update: docker run --rm --add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway -v $(pwd)/scripts:/scripts -v $(pwd)/test/reference:/screenshots -w /scripts mcr.microsoft.com/playwright:v1.52.0-noble bash -c 'npm install playwright@1.52.0 2>/dev/null && node screenshot-examples.mjs'
